name: Gauge
description: Single-value gauge with radial, arc, and linear variants and threshold colour bands.

api.name: Gauge
api.description: Single-value gauge with radial, arc, and linear variants and threshold colour bands.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The current value, clamped to Min–Max for both the drawn arc/bar and the announced aria-valuenow.

parameters.name: Min
parameters.description: Lower bound of the gauge's range (default 0).

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: Upper bound of the gauge's range (default 100).

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual form: Radial (default, 270° arc with a gap at the bottom), Linear (horizontal bar), or Arc (180° semicircle).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Overall pixel size — width for Linear, diameter for Radial/Arc (default 120).

parameters.name: StrokeWidth
parameters.description: Thickness in pixels of the track/value stroke (default 8).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Custom text shown in place of the computed percentage, and used as the meter's aria-label when set.

parameters.name: LabelContent
parameters.description: Custom center/label content — overrides the default text. Drop in a <NumberTicker> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated value, instead of duplicating count-up animation in core. (#277)

parameters.name: ShowValue
parameters.description: When true (default), renders the value/label text centered on (or below, for Linear) the gauge.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Theme color token (without the --color- prefix) for the filled value stroke/bar when no Thresholds match (default "primary").

parameters.name: TrackColor
parameters.description: Theme color token (without the --color- prefix) for the unfilled track (default "muted").

parameters.name: Thresholds
parameters.description: Optional value-based color overrides, evaluated highest-threshold-first: the first entry whose Value is <= the current Value wins, falling back to Color when none match.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the gauge's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the gauge's root role="meter" element.

examples.title: Arc (semicircle)
examples.code:
<Gauge Value="30" Variant="Gauge.GaugeVariant.Arc" />
<Gauge Value="65" Variant="Gauge.GaugeVariant.Arc" />
<Gauge Value="95" Variant="Gauge.GaugeVariant.Arc" />

examples.title: Linear
examples.code:
<Gauge Value="40" Variant="Gauge.GaugeVariant.Linear" Size="200" />
<Gauge Value="70" Variant="Gauge.GaugeVariant.Linear" Size="200" Color="success" />
<Gauge Value="90" Variant="Gauge.GaugeVariant.Linear" Size="200" Color="destructive" />

examples.title: Custom Label
examples.code:
<Gauge Value="72" Label="CPU" Size="120" />
<Gauge Value="48" Label="RAM" Size="120" />
<Gauge Value="33" Label="Disk" Size="120" />

slots.name: LabelContent
slots.description: Custom center/label content — overrides the default text. Drop in a <NumberTicker> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated value, instead of duplicating count-up animation in core. (#277)

mdSummary:
# Gauge

Single-value gauge with radial, arc, and linear variants and threshold colour bands.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/gauge

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Gauge | Value | `double` | `0` | The current value, clamped to Min–Max for both the drawn arc/bar and the announced aria-valuenow. |
| Gauge | Min | `double` | `0` | Lower bound of the gauge's range (default 0). |
| Gauge | Max | `double` | `100` | Upper bound of the gauge's range (default 100). |
| Gauge | Variant | `GaugeVariant` | `GaugeVariant.Radial` | Visual form: Radial (default, 270° arc with a gap at the bottom), Linear (horizontal bar), or Arc (180° semicircle). |
| Gauge | Size | `int` | `120` | Overall pixel size — width for Linear, diameter for Radial/Arc (default 120). |
| Gauge | StrokeWidth | `int` | `8` | Thickness in pixels of the track/value stroke (default 8). |
| Gauge | Label | `string?` | `` | Custom text shown in place of the computed percentage, and used as the meter's aria-label when set. |
| Gauge | LabelContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom center/label content — overrides the default text. Drop in a \<NumberTicker\> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated value, instead of duplicating count-up animation in core. (#277) |
| Gauge | ShowValue | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), renders the value/label text centered on (or below, for Linear) the gauge. |
| Gauge | Color | `string` | `"primary"` | Theme color token (without the --color- prefix) for the filled value stroke/bar when no Thresholds match (default "primary"). |
| Gauge | TrackColor | `string` | `"muted"` | Theme color token (without the --color- prefix) for the unfilled track (default "muted"). |
| Gauge | Thresholds | `IReadOnlyList<GaugeThreshold>?` | `` | Optional value-based color overrides, evaluated highest-threshold-first: the first entry whose Value is \<= the current Value wins, falling back to Color when none match. |
| Gauge | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the gauge's root element. |
| Gauge | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the gauge's root role="meter" element. |

## Slots
- `LabelContent` (Gauge) — Custom center/label content — overrides the default text. Drop in a \<NumberTicker\> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated value, instead of duplicating count-up animation in core. (#277)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Gauge />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Gauge/Gauge.razor`
